notes: Plugin-native rework: retired install.sh/install_helpers.py/component-namespaces.json and generated commands/ (OpenCode >=1.1.48 lists skills as slash commands natively); added dist/opencode/plugin/ (dependency-free config-hook plugin registering skills/ via skills.paths and AGENTS.md via instructions; version mirrors the core manifest-dev plugin). Skills payload re-flavored once: plugin-qualified skill ids (manifest-dev:/manifest-dev-tools:) stripped to bare names, matching Pi, since the install-time suffix rewrite that used to resolve them is retired. claude-plugins sources unchanged since the recorded source_commit.
